name: Power BI

hero.heading: Gapflow and Power BI
hero.subheading: Explore the world of endless possibilities with purpose-built automation

documentation.title: Getting Started with Power BI

documentation.title: Advanced Power BI Automation
documentation.description: Discover advanced techniques for dataset management, scheduled refreshes, and API optimization.

documentation.title: Power BI Security Best Practices
documentation.description: Understanding row-level security, workspace permissions, and secure data access patterns.

tutorials.title: Automate Power BI Report Distribution
tutorials.description: Learn how to automatically generate and distribute Power BI reports to stakeholders via email, Teams, or Slack on a custom schedule with filtered data.

tutorials.title: Real-Time Data Pipelines to Power BI
tutorials.description: Build streaming data pipelines that push real-time data from various sources into Power BI datasets for live dashboard updates.

tutorials.title: Power BI Alert Management
tutorials.description: Set up intelligent alert systems that monitor KPIs, detect anomalies, and automatically notify teams through multiple channels when thresholds are breached.

faqs.question: How do I authenticate with Power BI?
faqs.answer: Use Azure AD OAuth 2.0 authentication. You'll register an app in Azure AD, grant Power BI permissions, and use the credentials in Gapflow.

faqs.question: Can I push real-time data to Power BI?
faqs.answer: Yes! Gapflow supports Power BI streaming datasets and push datasets, allowing you to send real-time data that updates dashboards instantly.

faqs.question: What export formats are supported?
faqs.answer: You can export Power BI reports in PDF, PowerPoint (PPTX), PNG, and Excel formats through Gapflow automation workflows.

faqs.question: How do I handle large datasets?
faqs.answer: For large datasets, use incremental refresh in Power BI and batch processing in Gapflow. The API has rate limits, so implement pagination and throttling.

faqs.question: Can I manage workspaces programmatically?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Gapflow can create workspaces, manage permissions, deploy reports, and handle dataset configurations through the Power BI REST API.

faqs.question: What about row-level security?
faqs.answer: Gapflow respects Power BI's row-level security settings. You can also programmatically manage RLS roles and memberships through workflows.

limits.title: API Rate Limits
limits.description: Power BI enforces rate limits on API calls. Gapflow implements automatic throttling and retry logic to handle these limits gracefully.

limits.title: Dataset Size Limits
limits.description: Be aware of dataset size limits based on your Power BI license (Pro, Premium, Embedded). Plan your data model accordingly.

limits.title: Concurrent Refresh Limits
limits.description: Power BI limits concurrent dataset refreshes. Schedule workflows to avoid conflicts and optimize refresh timing.

limits.title: Export Limitations
limits.description: Large reports may take time to export. For complex reports, consider using paginated reports or splitting into smaller sections.
